summary: Phase 1-3 Implementation Testing Complete: Dashboard Command Center and Scenario Comparison pages verified. All 12 backend API tests pass. Dashboard displays 4 key metrics (Net Worth $1,978,000, Monthly Cashflow +$5,417, Goal Progress 3/4, Retirement Success 81%), Financial Health Score gauge (82-87/100), Top Actions with $ impact (+$520,000 at retirement), Goal Progress bars with icons, Net Worth Trend mini-chart, Asset Allocation pie chart, and AI Insights section. Scenario Comparison page shows 3 scenarios side-by-side with retirement age, success rate, balance, monthly income, and Net Worth Projection chart with multiple lines.

issues: Compliance modal appears on every page load - localStorage persistence not working reliably across navigations

passed_tests: Backend API health check - 200 OK
Monte Carlo simulation - returns projections with percentiles (p10, p50, p90)
Net Worth Trend API - returns 25 data points for Wheeler household
Health Score API - returns score 86/100 with dimensions breakdown
Tax rates endpoint - returns 2024-25 personal and company rates
Tax analysis endpoint - calculates tax correctly
Loan analysis endpoint - calculates repayments with variable rate scenarios
Debt/Equity analysis - calculates ratios correctly
CRM households endpoint - returns 3 households (Wheeler, Chen, Patel)
CRM tasks endpoint - returns tasks list
CRM meetings endpoint - returns meetings list
SMSF analysis endpoint - returns contribution strategy
Dashboard Command Center loads with all 4 key metrics
Dashboard - Financial Health Score gauge displays correctly
Dashboard - Top Actions with $ impact (4 actions displayed)
Dashboard - Goal Progress bars with icons (4 goals)
Dashboard - Net Worth Trend mini-chart renders
Dashboard - Asset Allocation pie chart renders
Dashboard - AI Insights section displays
Scenario Comparison page loads with 3 scenarios
Scenario Comparison - shows retirement age, success rate, balance, monthly income
Scenario Comparison - Net Worth Projection chart with multiple lines
Scenario Comparison - Compare View switch present
Scenario Comparison - Add Scenario button works
Navigation includes 'Scenario Compare' under Planning
Decision Engine page loads - Health Score 87/100
Life Timeline page loads - Net Worth projections
Goal Tracker page loads - 4 goals, 3/4 on track
AI Advisor page loads - Multi-LLM powered
Client CRM page loads - 3 households, tasks, meetings
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: Dashboard was calling /api/decision/health-score but backend has /api/decision-engine/health-score - updated to correct endpoint
Dashboard fetches from MOCKED APIs: /api/decision-engine/health-score, /api/analyze/monte-carlo, /api/trends/net-worth - all return calculated/mock data as expected
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1-3 implementation verified. Dashboard Command Center shows: Net Worth $1,978,000, Monthly Cashflow +$5,417, Goal Progress 3/4, Retirement Success 81%. Scenario Comparison shows 3 scenarios (Current Path, Aggressive Savings, Early Retirement) with side-by-side comparison. All APIs return MOCKED data. Compliance modal appears on every page - dismiss by checking checkbox and clicking 'I Understand & Accept'. Navigation updated with 'Scenario Compare' under Planning section.

mocked_apis.note: Dashboard and Scenario Comparison use MOCKED APIs that return calculated data
